issues.description: The file imports from shared/ReactSymbols, creating a dependency on shared modules. While necessary, this tight coupling means changes to these symbols could affect memo functionality.
issues.suggested_fix: Consider abstracting symbol definitions behind an API if they need frequent changes, though this may be over-engineering for this module.

issues.description: The file has a @noflow comment, which disables Flow type checking. This could lead to type-related bugs slipping into production.
issues.suggested_fix: Remove the @noflow comment and ensure the file is properly typed with Flow for better type safety.

issues.description: The error message for null component type is good, but there's no validation for whether the type is actually a valid React component (e.g., checking for render method).
issues.suggested_fix: Add additional validation to ensure the type is a valid React component, not just non-null.
